_v0_6_4_note: HISTORICAL execution plan, drafted 2026-02-01 for the v0.1 / v0.2 OpenClaw integration milestone. The 'FHRSS+FCPE / 73,000x compression / 100% recovery at 40% loss' rationales inside this document describe the pre-v0.6 backend; the current active memory substrate is hybrid FAISS + FCE-M v0.6.0. Authoritative current state: docs/RESEARCH_PROGRESS_v0.6.md.

meta.author: Development Team
meta.objective: Integrate BYON infinite memory orchestration system into OpenClaw platform while preserving both systems

current_state.description: OpenClaw operates as a messaging platform with extensions. FHRSS+FCPE exists in INFINIT_MEMORYCONTEXT and is partially integrated as the memory-fhrss-fcpe extension.

openclaw_platform.role: Main platform - gateway, channels, UI, agents

fhrss_fcpe_python.role: Infinite memory system with FCPE compression and FHRSS recovery

target_state.description: OpenClaw as PLATFORM + BYON as ORCHESTRATOR with infinite memory and MACP v1.1 protocol

layers.name: OpenClaw Platform Layer
layers.role: SINGLE communication platform: all inbound/outbound messages go through OpenClaw only. BYON must not implement direct channel IO.

layers.name: BYON Orchestration Layer
layers.role: Decision making - receives input, consults memory, generates plans, controls flow

layers.name: Security & Validation Layer
layers.role: Validation - Ed25519 signing, policy enforcement, user approval checkpoint

layers.name: Execution Layer
layers.role: SINGLE execution engine: byon-executor (air-gapped). No other component executes code, edits files, or runs tests.

layers.name: Memory & Persistence Layer
layers.role: Infinite memory - FHRSS+FCPE storage, audit trail, calendar indexing, global memory state

layers.name: Kernel Enforcement Layer (Dual Gate)
layers.role: WFP Semantic Guard - OS Kernel level enforcement of BYON intents. The 'Physical' gate.

phases.name: Foundation Setup
phases.description: Creating directory structure and basic configuration for BYON orchestrator

tasks.name: Create BYON directory structure
tasks.description: Create separate structure for BYON orchestrator in the project

tasks.name: Configure BYON-OpenClaw integration points
tasks.description: Define integration points between BYON and OpenClaw
tasks.implementation_notes: OpenClawBridge (SINGLE platform constraint), ChannelAdapter (normalize all channel types), MemoryBridge (FHRSS+FCPE primary, memory-core fallback)

tasks.name: Create unified configuration
tasks.description: Unified configuration for the entire BYON+OpenClaw system
tasks.implementation_notes: Full ByonSystemConfig type with system, openclaw, byon, security, audit, executor sections. Environment variable overrides supported.

phases.name: Memory System Integration
phases.description: Full integration of the FHRSS+FCPE system with BYON orchestrator

tasks.name: Create Python memory service
tasks.description: Python HTTP service for FHRSS+FCPE running as a microservice
tasks.implementation_notes: FastAPI server wrapping FHRSS+FCPE. Supports store (code/conversation/fact), search, test_recovery, stats. SimpleEmbedder placeholder for production sentence-transformers.

tasks.name: Enhance TypeScript memory client
tasks.description: Enhancement of TypeScript client with full support for AgentMemory API
tasks.implementation_notes: Full MemoryClient implementing MemoryServiceAPI. Retry logic, timeout handling, searchAll for combined queries.

tasks.name: Implement memory context manager
tasks.description: Manager for semantic context in the BYON flow
tasks.implementation_notes: ContextManager builds MemoryContext for EvidencePacks. FactExtractor uses regex patterns for code/text. SimilaritySearch supports semantic/keyword/hybrid strategies.

tasks.name: Create memory initialization and health checks
tasks.description: Mandatory memory initialization and health checks
tasks.requirement: BYON orchestrator MUST NOT START without memory service
tasks.implementation_notes: initializeMemory() with HARD STOP (exit 10) if memory unavailable. MemoryHealth for continuous monitoring with alert callbacks.

phases.name: MACP Protocol Implementation
phases.description: Implementation of Multi-Agent Control Protocol v1.1 for BYON

tasks.name: Implement EvidencePack builder
tasks.description: Constructor for EvidencePack with facts, quotes, codebase context and memory context IDs
tasks.implementation_notes: Enhanced EvidencePackBuilder with auto-extraction methods, memory integration, codebase context helpers, and forbidden data detection

tasks.name: Implement PlanDraft generator
tasks.description: Generator for PlanDraft with actions and risk assessment
tasks.implementation_notes: PlanDraftBuilder with auto risk level calculation, ActionGenerator with intent parsing, RiskAssessor with factor-based scoring

tasks.name: Implement ApprovalRequest creator
tasks.description: Creator for ApprovalRequest with summary and security checks
tasks.implementation_notes: ApprovalRequestBuilder with plan integration, SecurityChecker with forbidden patterns, dangerous commands, path traversal, injection detection

tasks.name: Implement ExecutionOrder with Ed25519 signing
tasks.description: Creator for ExecutionOrder with cryptographic signature
tasks.implementation_notes: Ed25519Signer with key generation and verification, KeyManager with encrypted storage, ExecutionOrderBuilder requiring signed orders

tasks.name: Implement JohnsonReceipt generator
tasks.description: Generator for execution receipts
tasks.implementation_notes: JohnsonReceiptBuilder with action result tracking, error handling, verification status, and execution summary generation

phases.name: Security & Policy Layer
phases.description: Implementation of security layer with policies and whitelists

tasks.name: Implement action whitelist
tasks.description: Whitelist for allowed actions and forbidden patterns
tasks.implementation_notes: ActionWhitelist with configurable policies, ForbiddenPathsChecker with system/credential/vcs/package/lock_file/build categories, ForbiddenPatternsChecker with network/process/eval/traversal/filesystem patterns

tasks.name: Implement risk assessment
tasks.description: Risk assessment system for actions
tasks.implementation_notes: RiskAssessmentSystem with weighted factor scoring (fileDeletes: 0.20, fileCreates: 0.10, codeEdits: 0.15, actionCount: 0.15, iterations: 0.10, rollback: 0.15, sensitivity: 0.15). Thresholds: low ≤30, medium ≤60, high >60

tasks.name: Implement resource limits by risk
tasks.description: Resource limits based on risk level
tasks.implementation_notes: ResourceLimitsManager tracks iterations, time, memory, disk, file operations. Supports real-time limit checking, usage percentage calculation, remaining resource queries

tasks.name: Implement BYON Style Contract validator
tasks.description: Validator for BYON output style
tasks.implementation_notes: BYONStyleValidator with 7 forbidden categories (psychology, empathy, stories, meta, filler, hedging, apologetic). ValidateOrRegenerateController with auto-fix and regeneration callback. JSON Schema for style contract. CompositePolicyChecker combining all policy checks.

phases.name: Audit Trail & Indexing
phases.description: Implementation of immutable audit system with calendar indexing

tasks.name: Implement immutable audit trail
tasks.description: Immutable audit system with hash-chain
tasks.implementation_notes: HashChain with SHA-256, tamper-evident verification. DocumentStateManager with lifecycle states (draft, pending, approved, executed, failed, cancelled). AuditService combining both with auto-checkpoints.

tasks.name: Implement calendar indexing
tasks.description: Calendar-based indexing for fast queries
tasks.implementation_notes: CalendarIndex with hierarchical year/month/week/day/hour indexing. Supports time range queries, today/week/month shortcuts, statistics by document type and event type.

tasks.name: Implement daily digest generator
tasks.description: Generator for daily summaries
tasks.implementation_notes: DailyDigestGenerator with summary metrics, hourly activity, document digests, state changes, errors, and highlights. IntegratedAuditSystem combining AuditService, CalendarIndex, and DailyDigestGenerator.

tasks.name: Implement Global Memory Vitalizer (GMV)
tasks.description: Local daemon that consumes read-only FHRSS+FCPE + audit trail and produces metadata (Attractors + GlobalMemorySummary). Non-neuronal, low-CPU, zero executor/channel access.
tasks.implementation_notes: Complete GMV implementation with attractor engine, coherence calculator, and daemon. Zero executor/channel/network access enforced.

tasks.name: Add JSON Schemas for GMV outputs
tasks.description: Official schema (Draft 2020-12) for Attractor and GlobalMemorySummary with document_type discriminator.
tasks.implementation_notes: JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 with document_type discriminator for Attractor and GlobalMemorySummary

tasks.name: Add TS validators for GMV schemas
tasks.description: TypeScript validator (Ajv) for Attractor and GlobalMemorySummary.
tasks.implementation_notes: Ajv-based validators for GMV schemas with TypeScript type guards

tasks.name: Integrate GMV read-only in EvidencePack
tasks.description: Worker includes reference to GlobalMemorySummary + top attractor IDs in EvidencePack (metadata-only, structural bias).
tasks.implementation_notes: GlobalMemoryHint type added, EvidencePackBuilder with GMV validation, Auditor GMV gate for metadata-only enforcement

phases.name: BYON Orchestrator Core
phases.description: Implementation of the BYON orchestrator core

tasks.name: Implement Worker Agent
tasks.description: Main agent that reads inbox and generates evidence + plan
tasks.implementation_notes: WorkerAgent with InboxWatcher, PlanGenerator, MemoryHandler, GMV integration. evidence-builder.ts already exists from session 006.

tasks.name: Implement Auditor Agent
tasks.description: Validation and signing agent
tasks.implementation_notes: AuditorAgent with Ed25519 signing, ApprovalManager with auto-approve for low risk. validator.ts already exists from session 006.

tasks.name: Implement Executor Agent
tasks.description: Air-gapped execution agent
tasks.air_gap_requirement: NO NETWORK ACCESS - all errors reported back to Worker
tasks.implementation_notes: ExecutorAgent AIR-GAPPED - shell_exec disabled, path traversal prevention, signature verification required. JohnsonReceipt for all execution results.

tasks.name: Implement handoff system
tasks.description: File-based inter-agent communication system
tasks.implementation_notes: HandoffManager with file-based channels, FileWatcher for polling, Serializer with hash verification, OrchestratorHandoffController for high-level coordination.

phases.name: OpenClaw Integration
phases.description: Integration of BYON orchestrator with OpenClaw platform

tasks.name: Create OpenClaw-BYON bridge
tasks.description: Bridge between OpenClaw channels and BYON orchestrator
tasks.flow: OpenClaw Channel -> Message Adapter -> BYON Inbox -> Orchestrator -> Response -> Channel
tasks.implementation_notes: MessageAdapter orchestrates full flow: OpenClaw -> Worker -> Auditor -> Executor -> Response. Includes auto-approve for low risk, approval request generation, response formatting per channel.

tasks.name: Integrate with OpenClaw memory system
tasks.description: Replacing/augmenting the OpenClaw memory system with FHRSS+FCPE
tasks.strategy: BYON memory becomes primary, OpenClaw memory-core as fallback
tasks.implementation_notes: ByonMemoryProvider wraps FHRSS+FCPE as primary with OpenClaw MemoryIndexManager fallback. Unified search interface, evidence building support, recovery testing capabilities.

tasks.name: Create approval UI in OpenClaw
tasks.description: Interface for plan approval in the OpenClaw UI
tasks.implementation_notes: Created Lit Element components following OpenClaw patterns. Controller handles state management and gateway communication. View renders approval cards, detail overlay, and action buttons. Includes risk level badges, security checks display, and expiration countdown.

tasks.name: Create CLI commands for BYON
tasks.description: CLI commands for interacting with BYON
tasks.implementation_notes: Full CLI with approve (list/approve/reject/auto), watch (real-time monitoring), status (memory/agents/handoff), history (audit trail), inbox (messages). Supports --json output and color-coded terminal display.

tasks.name: Create Docker configuration
tasks.description: Dockerfile and docker-compose for the entire stack
tasks.implementation_notes: Multi-stage Dockerfile with --target for worker/auditor/executor. Memory-service uses FastAPI with mounted FHRSS+FCPE. Executor runs air-gapped with network_mode:none. Redis and watcher included. Development override with hot-reload support.

tasks.name: Create startup scripts
tasks.description: Scripts for starting and monitoring the system
tasks.implementation_notes: start-byon.sh with pre-flight checks, directory setup, key generation, health wait. stop-byon.sh with graceful/hard stop, volume cleanup options. health-check.sh with JSON output, watch mode, container health inspection. setup-keys.sh with Ed25519 generation, RSA fallback, sign/verify testing.

tasks.name: Create unit tests
tasks.description: Unit tests for all BYON components
tasks.implementation_notes: Unit tests for EvidencePack, PlanDraft, ExecutionOrder, JohnsonReceipt, HashChain, ActionWhitelist, ForbiddenPaths, ForbiddenPatterns, RiskAssessment, ResourceLimits, MemoryClient, FactExtractor, ContextManager, Ed25519Signer, HashComputation, KeyManager. Vitest configuration with 70% coverage thresholds.

tasks.name: Create integration tests
tasks.description: Integration tests for the complete BYON -> OpenClaw flow
tasks.implementation_notes: Integration tests covering: Worker->Auditor flow (evidence to execution order), Executor flow (signature verification, action execution, receipt generation), Memory system (store/search/recovery), Handoff system (file-based communication between agents), Full message flow (OpenClaw -> Worker -> Auditor -> Executor -> Response)

tasks.name: Create security tests
tasks.description: Security tests for policies and signatures
tasks.implementation_notes: Security tests covering: Ed25519 signature verification (key generation, signing, tamper detection, replay prevention), Path traversal prevention (directory escape, URL encoding, forbidden paths), Policy enforcement (forbidden patterns, action whitelist, air-gap isolation), Hash chain integrity (tamper detection, audit trail, chain verification)

tasks.name: Create documentation
tasks.description: Technical documentation and usage guides
tasks.implementation_notes: Complete technical documentation: Architecture (layered design, MACP protocol, component overview), Quick Start (installation, configuration, usage), Security (Ed25519, air-gap, policies, threat model), API (Memory Service endpoints, Protocol types, CLI commands, Handoff formats)

memory_provider.decision: FHRSS+FCPE as the primary memory provider
memory_provider.fallback: memory-core from OpenClaw for backward compatibility

orchestration_protocol.rationale: Clear separation between agents, file-based handoff, user approval checkpoint

security_model.rationale: Maximum security - the executor has no network access, all commands are signed

integration_strategy.decision: Bridge pattern - OpenClaw remains intact, BYON connects through adapters
integration_strategy.rationale: Preserving OpenClaw functionality, clear upgrade path

communication_platform.decision: OpenClaw is the SINGLE communication platform
communication_platform.rationale: Single gateway for all channels; BYON must not implement direct channel IO.

execution_engine.decision: byon-executor is the SINGLE execution engine
execution_engine.rationale: Air-gapped executor; deterministic receipts; no side-channel execution.

global_memory_vitalizer.decision: GMV is a non-decision metadata daemon
global_memory_vitalizer.rationale: Maintains emergent global memory state without autonomy. Read-only on FHRSS+FCPE, write-only metadata.

functional: BYON orchestrator starts and initializes memory
Messages from OpenClaw channels reach BYON inbox
Worker generates evidence packs with memory context
Auditor validates and signs execution orders
Executor executes actions in air-gapped mode
Receipts return to Worker for analysis
integration: Fallback to OpenClaw memory when BYON is unavailable
CLI commands work in both modes
